name: vscode-nav2-bt-preview
description: Simple VS Code previewer for ROS 2 Nav2 and BehaviorTree.CPP XML behavior trees.

commands.title: Nav2 BT Preview: Import TreeNodesModel XML File
Nav2 BT Preview: Import TreeNodesModel XML from URL
Nav2 BT Preview: Remove Imported TreeNode Definition
Nav2 BT Preview: Clear Imported TreeNodesModel Definitions

nav2BtPreview.autoSaveEdits.description: Automatically save the XML file after applying attribute changes from the behavior tree preview.

nav2BtPreview.allowEmptyAttributes.description: Allow empty XML attributes when applying edits. When false, empty attributes are removed from the XML.

nav2BtPreview.openOnlyOneBehaviorTree.description: Show only one BehaviorTree at a time. When false, SubTree nodes can be expanded inline into one combined graph.

nav2BtPreview.autoFitOnTreeChange.description: Automatically fit the graph view after opening, closing, or navigating BehaviorTree/SubTree views. When false, the current zoom and pan are preserved.
